<timestamp>Thursday, Jun 11, 2026, 5:16 PM (UTC+5:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
what kind of projects will trilogy innovations accepts ?
</user_query>

I don't have any information about Trilogy Innovations' project acceptance criteria — that's outside what I can see in this workspace, and I'd just be guessing if I tried to answer.

For accurate, current details on what kinds of projects they accept, the best sources would be Trilogy Innovations' official website or a direct contact with their team.

That said, my actual role here is to be your **coaching guide** — I help engineers early in their careers build the non-technical skills (communication, problem-solving approach, navigating ambiguity, etc.) covered in the coaching modules in this workspace.

Would you like to start (or continue) a coaching session? If so, just let me know your name so I can set up your progress tracking, and we'll dive into the modules.

 The user is asking about what projects Trilogy Innovations accepts, which is outside my scope as a coaching resource for software engineering soft skills. I don't have information about their project criteria, and I shouldn't guess. I should acknowledge this is beyond what I can help with here.
